# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Commands

```sh
# Development
yarn test              # Run all tests (vitest)
yarn test:run          # Run tests once (CI mode)
yarn lint             # Lint with oxlint
yarn format:check     # Check formatting with oxfmt
yarn typecheck        # TypeScript type checking
yarn fix              # Auto-fix lint + format issues

# Types (rarely needed - types auto-generated from OpenAPI)
yarn generate-types   # Regenerate src/types.ts from OpenAPI spec

# Release
yarn release           # Semantic release (requires GitHub auth)
```

## Architecture

### SDK Pattern

All endpoint functions follow `(client: ExistClient, params?) => Promise<T>`:

```ts
const profile = await getProfile(client);
const attrs = await getAttributesWithValues(client, {days: 7, limit: 50});
```

### Type Generation

`src/types.ts` is auto-generated by openapi-typescript from the exist.io OpenAPI spec. Do not edit manually — regenerate with `yarn generate-types`. Add re-exports for commonly used types in the `// Re-export commonly used types` section near the bottom.

### Module Structure

- `src/client.ts` — `createClient()` factory and `ExistClient` interface
- `src/endpoints/` — One file per endpoint group (account, attributes, auth, averages, correlations)
- `src/types.ts` — Auto-generated OpenAPI types + convenience re-exports
- `src/oauth/` — OAuth2 client implementations (authorization code, device flow, token stores)

### Endpoint Implementation Pattern

Each endpoint module exports async functions that call `client.get()` or `client.post()`. Query params are built via a local `buildQuery` helper that filters undefined values:

```ts
function buildQuery(params: GetAttributesParams): string {
  const entries = Object.entries(params).filter(([, v]) => v !== undefined);
  if (entries.length === 0) return '';
  return '?' + entries.map(([k, v]) => `${k}=${encodeURIComponent(String(v))}`).join('&');
}
```

### Cross-Runtime Compatibility

Token stores use a platform-abstraction layer (`src/oauth/file-store.ts`) to handle differences between Node.js and Deno/Bun filesystems. The store interface in `src/oauth/token-store.ts` is the abstraction boundary.

### OAuth2 Flow

Uses `oauth4webapi` for protocol logic. `createOAuth2Client()` factory returns either an `AuthorizationCodeClient` or `DeviceCodeClient` depending on `flow` option. Both return an `ExistClient` from `getAuthenticatedClient()`.

## Important Files

- `src/client.ts` — Core client factory (read to understand authentication schemes)
- `src/types.ts` — All API types (generated, but re-exports are manual)
- `src/endpoints/` — Endpoint implementations
- `src/oauth/` — OAuth2 implementation
- `openapi.yaml` — OpenAPI spec source (used by generate-types)
